---
title: "report"
output: html_document
---

[introduction]

```{r}
par(mfrow=c(1,3))
x <- runif(50)
hist(x, main='Histogram of 50 draws')
y <- runif(500)
hist(y, main='Histogram of 500 draws')
z <- runif(5000)
hist(z, main='Histogram of 5000 draws')
```

[B: simulating random variable S with uniformly distributed variable U]
```{r}
n<-10

sim.coin <- function(n) {
  U<-runif(n, -1, 1)
  print(U)
  for (i in 1:n) {
    if (U[i]<0) {
      U[i]<--1
    }
    else {
      U[i]<-1
    }
  }
  return (U)
}

sim.coin(n)
```
[C 3650 cumsum(sim.coin(n))]

```{r}
n<-3650

sim.coin <- function(n) {
  S<-runif(n, -1, 1)
  for (i in 1:n) {
    if (S[i]<0) {
      S[i]<--1
    }
    else {
      S[i]<-1
    }
  }
  return (S)
}

sum<-0
cumsum <- function(x) {
  for (i in 1:3650) {
    x<-x+S[i]
  }
  return (S)
}
cumsum(sim.coin(n))
plot<-
```
[discussion of efficacy of random number generator]


[introduction to meat of assignment]
